title: astramem-retrieval@1 result envelope
description: Result envelope for the shared retrieval contract (ADR-005). Every hit carries a ScoreExplanation — per ADR-005 this is the debugging/trust surface and is never optional, regardless of the query's `explain` flag. The signal map is open (additionalProperties) so cloud's 6-signal fusion and local's 4-signal fusion (bm25, cosine, importance, freshness — see src/search/fuse.ts) both validate without the schema hardcoding either engine's signal set.

query.description: Echo of the originating query, for trace correlation.

explanation.description: ScoreExplanation (ADR-005): per-signal raw score, weight, and contribution to the final score.

final.description: Sum of all signal contributions; matches the hit's top-level `score`.

signals.description: Open map keyed by signal name (e.g. bm25, cosine, importance, freshness locally; local's 4 signals or cloud's 6, including RRF/cross-encoder signals, both validate here).
